summary: Completed Phase 1+2 testing. All new features working correctly: Dashboard with 6 stats including Cuenta Atrás (countdown) and Pagos Pend. (pending payments), Reminders section, event countdown badges, HowItWorks tutorial page with 8 steps, Timeline tab, and Semanal (Weekly Summary) tab.
passed_tests: Backend: Login with planner@test.com / test1234 - 200 OK
Backend: Dashboard stats endpoint returns all 6 fields including nearest_countdown and total_pending_payments
Backend: Reminders endpoint returns array with type, message, event_id fields
Backend: Events, Tasks, Stats, Suppliers endpoints all working
UI: Dashboard shows 6 stats: Eventos (1), Próximos (1), Tareas (0/15), Vencidas (0), Cuenta Atrás (195), Pagos Pend. (0€)
UI: Reminders section visible with 'Boda García: 14 tarea(s) esta semana'
UI: Event card shows countdown badge '195d'
UI: 'Cómo Funciona' button visible in dashboard header
UI: HowItWorks page loads with 8 step indicators and 8 step cards
UI: Back button returns from HowItWorks to dashboard
UI: Event detail page shows 10 tabs: Resumen, Timeline, Tareas, Invitados, Presupuesto, Proveedores, Notas, Galería, Archivos, Semanal
UI: Timeline tab displays progress bar (0%), countdown (195 días), and phase card (9-6 meses antes)
UI: Semanal tab displays 3 cards (Completado: 0, Esta Semana: 14, Vencidas: 0) with task list
critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard stats API properly returns countdown and pending payments data
Reminders API generates appropriate alerts based on task status and event dates
TimelineModule correctly groups tasks into phase buckets
HowItWorks page has good UX with step indicators and navigation
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 1+2 features fully tested. Dashboard has 6 stat cards (removed Invitados/Presupuesto, added Cuenta Atrás/Pagos Pend.). Reminders section shows overdue tasks, upcoming tasks, event countdowns. Event cards show countdown badge (e.g. '195d'). HowItWorks page at /como-funciona with 8 interactive steps. Event detail has 10 tabs including Timeline (with progress bar and phase cards) and Semanal (weekly summary with Completado/Esta Semana/Vencidas cards). All data-testid attributes present for automated testing.
